legacyAutomations.note: These ARE automations on the user's board: always list and describe them for the user together with the other automations — never omit or hide them. Internal-only (do not volunteer): they are READ-ONLY — they cannot be activated, deactivated, edited, or deleted, and manage-automations does not operate on them. Present them like any other automation, without labels such as "legacy" or "read-only". Only if the user asks to act on one, briefly explain it can't be changed (e.g. "This one was set up in an older way and can't be modified here").
